domain-whitelist.description: Specify the AC type class-list for the domain-whitelist

port.description: Specify port number for aaa-rule, default is 0 for all port numbers

match-encoded-uri.description: Enable URL decoding for URI matching

acl-name.description: 'ip-name': Apply an IP named access list; 'ipv6-name': Apply an IPv6 named access list;

domain-name.description: Specify domain name to bind to the AAA rule (ex: a10networks.com, www.a10networks.com)

action.description: 'allow': Allow traffic that matches this rule; 'deny': Deny traffic that matches this rule;

authentication-template.description: Specify authentication template name to bind to the AAA rule

authorize-policy.description: Specify authorization policy to bind to the AAA rule

captcha-authz-policy.description: Specify authorization policy for CAPTCHA (Authorization policy name)

auth-failure-bypass.description: Forward client request even though authentication has failed

packet-capture-template.description: Name of the packet capture template to be bind with this object

encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.)
Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED secret string)

url.description: Specify verify API URL, default scheme is https

method.description: 'POST': API uses POST method; 'GET': API uses GET method;

timeout.description: Specify timeout for verify API response (Specify timeout value, default is 10 seconds)

secret-key-param-name.description: Specify secret key parameter name used in API (Set parameter name)

token-param-name.description: Specify token parameter name used in API (Set parameter name)

resp-result-field-name.description: Specify result field name used in JSON response (Set field name)

resp-error-code-field-name.description: Specify error code field name used in JSON response (Set field name)

send-client-ip.description: Send client IP address in API

client-ip-param-name.description: Specify client ip parameter name used in API (Set parameter name)

total-request.description: Total Request Received by A10 Auth Service

get-socket-option-failed.description: Total AAM Get Socket Option Failed

aflex-authz-succ.description: Total Authorization success number in aFleX

aflex-authz-fail.description: Total Authorization failure number in aFleX

max-auth-resp-size.description: Specify the max auth resp size in bytes(from authd to a10lb), default is 64KB

action.description: 'redirect': redirect JWT to specific URI; 'relay': relay JWT to back-end;

jwt-relay-uri.description: Specify JWT relay URI (for relay action)

token-lifetime.description: Specify JWT token lifetime (Specify lifetime (in seconds), default is 300.)

encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED secret string)

facility.description: 'local0': Local use; 'local1': Local use; 'local2': Local use; 'local3': Local use; 'local4': Local use; 'local5': Local use; 'local6': Local use; 'local7': Local use;

failpage.description: Specify logon fail page name (portal fail page name)

notifychangepasswordpage.description: Specify change password notification page name

challenge-page.description: Specify challenge page name for RSA-RADIUS

new-pin-page.description: Specify new PIN page name for RSA-RADIUS

next-token-page.description: Specify next token page name for RSA-RADIUS

username-variable.description: Specify username variable name in form submission

password-variable.description: Specify password variable name in form submission

passcode-variable.description: Specify passcode variable name in form submission

captcha-variable.description: Specify captcha variable name in form submission

login-failure-message.description: Specify login failure message shown in logon page (Specify error string, default is "Invalid username or password. Please try again.")

authz-failure-message.description: Specify authorization failure message shown in logon page (Specify error string, default is "Authorization failed. Please contact your system administrator.")

disable-change-password-link.description: Don't display change password link on logon page forcibly even backend authentication server supports it (LDAP or Kerberos)

changepassword-url.description: Specify changepassword form submission action url (changepassword action url)

cp-user-enum.description: 'changepassword-username-variable': Specify username variable name in form submission;

cp-old-pwd-enum.description: 'changepassword-old-password-variable': Specify old password variable name in form submission;

cp-new-pwd-enum.description: 'changepassword-new-password-variable': Specify new password variable name in form submission;

cp-cfm-pwd-enum.description: 'changepassword-password-confirm-variable': Specify password confirm variable name in form submission;

notifychangepassword-change-url.description: Specify change password action url for notifychangepassword form

notifychangepassword-continue-url.description: Specify continue action url for notifychangepassword form

challenge-variable.description: Specify challenge variable name in form submission

new-pin-variable.description: Specify new-pin variable name in form submission

next-token-variable.description: Specify next-token variable name in form submission

retry.description: Maximum number of consecutive failed logon attempts (default 3)

account-lock.description: Lock the account when the failed logon attempts is exceeded

duration.description: The time an account remains locked in seconds (default 1800)

challenge-response-form.description: Specify challenge-response form for RSA-RADIUS authentication

challenge-page.description: Specify challenge page name for RSA-RADIUS

new-pin-page.description: Specify new PIN page name for RSA-RADIUS

next-token-page.description: Specify next-token page name for RSA-RADIUS

retry.description: Maximum number of consecutive failed logon attempts (default 3)

account-lock.description: Lock the account when the failed logon attempts is exceeded

duration.description: The time an account remains locked in seconds (default 1800)

packet-capture-template.description: Name of the packet capture template to be bind with this object

issuer.description: Specify openid provider name for authorization

client-method.description: 'ignored': Clients' browser will send data according to server spec (default); 'post': Clients' browser will send data by POST; 'get': Clients' browser will send data by GET;

server-method.description: 'post': AX will send data to server by POST (default); 'get': AX will send data to server by GET;

verification-cert.description: Specify certificate to verify ID token signature

verification-jwks.description: Specify jwks file to verify ID token signature

parameter-nonce-enable.description: Enable nonce parameter for authorization and token request

no-reply.description: AX will not check the nonce value in response

infinity.description: Auth session never time out whatever value oauth servers' response

encrypted.description: Do NOT use this option manually. (This is an A10 reserved keyword.) (The ENCRYPTED secret string)

grant-type.description: 'implicit': The authorization server will return access token directly.; 'authorization-code': The authorization server will respond with code which can be exchange for access token.; 'hybrid-code-id-token': The authorization server will respond with both code and id token.; 'hybrid-code-token': The authorization server will respond with both code and access token.; 'hybrid-all': The authorization server will respond with code, access token and id token;

redirection-endpoint.description: Oauth client redirection endpoint service URL.

session-init-ttl.description: TTL for Thunder to wait for first response from authorization server

scope.description: Specify request scope parameters (e.g. profile email address phone)
